findings.title: Microsoft March 2026 Patch Tuesday — 2 Public Zero-Days, 8 Critical Flaws
findings.summary: Microsoft patched 84 vulnerabilities including two publicly disclosed zero-days: a .NET DoS flaw (CVE-2026-26127) and a SQL Server privilege escalation (CVE-2026-21262), plus a critical RCE in Microsoft Devices.

findings.title: KadNap Botnet Infects 14,000+ Edge Devices via Kademlia DHT Protocol
findings.affected_technology: ASUS routers and edge networking devices
findings.summary: Black Lotus Labs discovered KadNap, a botnet using a custom Kademlia DHT protocol to build a stealth proxy network from 14,000+ compromised ASUS routers, with 60% of infections in the US.

findings.title: APT28 Deploys BEARDSHELL and COVENANT for Long-Term Ukraine Military Surveillance
findings.summary: ESET disclosed APT28 (Fancy Bear/GRU Unit 26165) using custom BEARDSHELL and COVENANT implants plus SLIMAGENT keylogger for persistent espionage against Ukrainian military personnel since April 2024.

findings.title: FortiGate NGFW Devices Exploited to Steal Service Account Credentials
findings.summary: SentinelOne reported a campaign exploiting FortiGate firewalls to extract configuration files containing AD/LDAP service account credentials, targeting healthcare, government, and MSP environments.

findings.title: CISA Flags Ivanti EPM Flaw as Actively Exploited — Patch in 3 Weeks
findings.summary: CISA added a recently patched high-severity Ivanti EPM vulnerability to KEV and ordered federal agencies to patch within three weeks after confirming active exploitation.

findings.title: HPE Aruba AOS-CX Critical Flaw Allows Unauthenticated Admin Password Reset
findings.summary: HPE patched multiple security vulnerabilities in Aruba AOS-CX including critical authentication bypass and code execution flaws allowing unauthenticated admin password resets.

findings.title: BlackSanta EDR Killer Targets HR Departments for Over a Year
findings.summary: A Russian-speaking threat actor has been targeting HR departments for over a year with malware delivering BlackSanta, a new EDR killer designed to disable endpoint security products.

findings.title: A0Backdoor Deployed via Microsoft Teams Phishing Against Financial and Healthcare Orgs
findings.summary: Attackers are contacting employees at financial and healthcare organizations via Microsoft Teams to trick them into granting Quick Assist remote access, then deploying the new A0Backdoor malware.

findings.title: Dutch Government Warns of Russian Signal and WhatsApp Account Hijacking Campaign
findings.summary: Russian state-sponsored hackers are running an ongoing phishing campaign targeting government officials, military, and journalists to hijack Signal and WhatsApp accounts and access sensitive messages.

noted.summary: New Zombie ZIP technique helps conceal payloads in compressed files to evade AV and EDR detection.
Ericsson US disclosed breach of 15,000+ employee and customer records after service provider hack.
